title: The Refactoring Catalog
summary: A working catalog of the refactorings that turn maintainable code into great code — code smells that trigger them, mechanical recipes for applying them safely, and the AI-era tooling that's reshaping how we do it at scale.

volatileChapters.reason: AI tooling landscape (Cursor / Copilot / Claude Code / Aider) shifts faster than the catalog itself.

inspiredBy.title: Refactoring: Improving the Design of Existing Code
